title: FANet: Quality-Aware Feature Aggregation Network for RGB-T Tracking
authors: Yabin Zhu, Chenglong Li, Yijuan Lu, Liang Lin, Bin Luo
tldr: 提出质量感知特征聚合网络（FANet）用于鲁棒RGB-T跟踪
relevanceNote: 解决传统方法在恶劣条件下的跟踪问题，通过互补视觉和热红外数据提高跟踪性能

title: Learning discriminative update adaptive spatial-temporal regularized correlation filter for RGB-T tracking
authors: Mingzheng Feng, Kechen Song, Yanyan Wang, Jie Liu, Yunhui Yan
journal: Journal of Visual Communication and Image Representation
tldr: 学习判别更新自适应时空正则化相关滤波器用于RGB-T跟踪
relevanceNote: 通过时空正则化提高相关滤波器在RGB-T跟踪中的判别能力

title: Fusing two-stream convolutional neural networks for RGB-T object tracking
authors: Chenglong Li, Xiaohao Wu, Nan Zhao, Xiaochun Cao, Jin Tang
tldr: 融合双流卷积神经网络用于RGB-T目标跟踪
relevanceNote: 通过双流CNN结构有效融合RGB和热红外模态信息

title: Multi-scale feature extraction and fusion with attention interaction for RGB-T tracking
authors: Haijiao Xing, Wei Wei, Lei Zhang, Yanning Zhang
tldr: 多尺度特征提取与注意力交互融合的RGB-T跟踪
relevanceNote: 通过多尺度特征提取和注意力机制提高RGB-T跟踪的准确性

title: Remote Photoplethysmography and Motion Tracking Convolutional Neural Network with Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory
authors: Ling Kong, Kai Xie, Kaixuan Niu, Jianbiao He, Wei Zhang
tldr: 提出基于双向LSTM的多模态融合疲劳检测方法
relevanceNote: 结合RGB相机和生理特征，提高疲劳检测准确率，有助于交通安全
